ineffective_date.description: End date that this schedule is valid. If null, then it is applied until an end date is set
ineffective_date.title: Ineffective date

assignees.description: Schedule specific to these assignees, if null, then applies as default to all assignees without a more specific fee schedule.
assignees.title: Assignees

items.description: Items that belong to this fee schedule (this field is only available for single requests)
items.title: Items

payer_id.description: Fee Schedule pricing specific to this payer, if null, then applies as default to all payers without a more specific fee schedule.
payer_id.title: Payer id

specialities.description: Schedule specific to these specialities, if null, then applies as default to all specialities without a more specific fee schedule.
specialities.title: Specialities

effective_date.description: Start date that this schedule is valid. If null, then since the beginning of time
effective_date.title: Effective date
